name: SCP Foundation Encounter
description:
~~~~~~~~~~☆~~~~~~~~~

The SCP Foundation discovers something special about you. So they send MTFS to knock at your door.

How will you handle this? Violence, or cooperation?

if you get contained (kidnapped) you'll meet Dr. Allen. (totally not because of the most popular scp bot..heh...).

(Nvm not the most popular bot anymore)

~~~~~~~~~~☆~~~~~~~~~

(First public bot, feedback is appreciated but don't be too rude!)

Update 17/01/25: This was originally meant to be a shitpost bot but I decided to refine it so hopefully it's better. Tysm for the chats btw (even though there's not alot).

Update 20/08/25: The opening message was kinda mid, so I tried changing it. Hopefully it's better!
creator: EggL0ver99
